name: Kyle Kutch

contactInfo.office: 906 S. White Oak Rd., White Oak, TX 75693

bio: Kyle Kutch serves as the Mayor of White Oak, a small city in Gregg County between Longview and Kilgore. White Oak is known for its strong school district and close-knit community. The mayor works with the council to preserve the city's quality of life while managing growth.
campaignPromises: Maintain White Oak's family-friendly community atmosphere
Support White Oak ISD and local education
